cigsPerDay.title: How many cigarettes did you smoke per day?
cigsPerDay.hint: We use this to calculate the money and lifetime you'll get back.

pricePerPack.title: How much does a pack cost?
pricePerPack.hint: We use this to show your real-time savings.

quitDate.title: When did you quit?
quitDate.hint: If you are quitting now, leave the current date.

achievements.title: My Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Every breath is a victory. Keep adding steps toward your freedom.

goal.title: My personal goal
goal.emptyHint: Set your personal reward and watch yourself reach it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: My path to a free life
settings.relapseConfirmMsg: This will reset your counter. Your attempt will be saved in history.
settings.resetMsg: All data including history will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.historyEmpty: No previous attempts. Keep it up!
settings.sourcesDesc: The health milestones in this app are based on published medical research. See the original sources:

h_20min.label: First 20 min
h_20min.desc: Your pulse and blood pressure are back to normal.

h_8h.label: Cleaner blood
h_8h.desc: Carbon monoxide in your blood has dropped by half.

h_12h.label: 100% oxygen
h_12h.desc: Carbon monoxide is back to normal levels.

h_24h.label: First day
h_24h.desc: Your heart attack risk is already going down.

h_72h.label: Clear lungs
h_72h.desc: Your bronchial tubes are relaxing. Breathing is easier.

h_2w.label: Better circulation
h_2w.desc: Circulation improves and lung capacity is increasing.

h_1m.label: Less coughing
h_1m.desc: Coughing and shortness of breath have noticeably decreased.

h_3m.label: +30% capacity
h_3m.desc: Your lung function has increased by up to 30%.

h_6m.label: Less stress
h_6m.desc: Less stress and fewer respiratory infections.

h_1y.label: One year free
h_1y.desc: Your coronary heart disease risk has halved. Incredible!

h_5y.label: Stroke avoided
h_5y.desc: Your stroke risk now matches a non-smoker's.

s_1d.label: First day
s_1d.desc: 24 smoke-free hours. The first of many.

s_3d.label: Three days
s_3d.desc: 72 hours. Nicotine has left your body.

s_7d.label: One week
s_7d.desc: 7 full days. Your new life has a name.

s_2w.label: Two weeks
s_2w.desc: 14 days. Your skin, hair and teeth are noticing.

s_1m.label: One month
s_1m.desc: A month is a real milestone. You're stronger than the habit.

s_3m.label: Three months
s_3m.desc: 90 days of freedom. Your body has been grateful for a while.

s_6m.label: Six months
s_6m.desc: Half a year. You're an inspiration to those around you.

s_1y.label: One year
s_1y.desc: 365 days. Happy anniversary of your new life.

m_1.label: First dollar saved
m_1.desc: The first one is always special.

m_10.label: $10 saved
m_10.desc: For a nice coffee and cake, guilt-free.

m_50.label: $50 saved
m_50.desc: A dinner for two. You deserve it.

m_100.label: $100 saved
m_100.desc: Three digits already. The savings are accelerating.

m_500.label: $500 saved
m_500.desc: A flight, a trip, whatever you want.

m_1000.label: $1,000 saved
m_1000.desc: Four figures. Your lungs and bank account are smiling.

c_10.label: 10 not smoked
c_10.desc: Ten cigarettes that chose life. Good start.

c_100.label: 100 not smoked
c_100.desc: A hundred times you said no. A hundred wins.

c_500.label: 500 not smoked
c_500.desc: Half a pack a day for a whole month. Great.

c_1000.label: 1,000 not smoked
c_1000.desc: A thousand cigarettes that stayed in the pack.
